about.title: About
body: Hi, I'm Allen — a student who likes turning ideas into things that actually run. This blog collects my experiments and notes on self-hosting, AI tools, and whatever I've been thinking about lately.

Most posts fall into three buckets: homelab and self-hosted services, like [Vaultwarden](/2026/07/13/vaultwarden-cloudflare-tunnel/) and [Open WebUI](/2025/11/08/deploying-openwebui-for-free-with-cloudflare-tunnel/) behind Cloudflare Tunnel; hands-on notes on AI tooling, lately mostly around Claude Code; and the occasional detour — learning techniques, anime, thought experiments.

The site itself is one of the projects: the first version was a Jekyll blog I hacked together with Claude Code over a summer ([here's the write-up](/2025/09/23/claude-code-jekyll-blog-journey/)), and it has since been rebuilt on Next.js, where the tinkering continues.
Away from the terminal, I like wandering around with a camera, chasing light.
If you'd like to chat, drop me a line at [contact@allenspace.de](mailto:contact@allenspace.de) or find me on [GitHub](https://github.com/allen5218).
